title: Real Artists Don't Starve
author: Jeff Goins
subline: The New Renaissance is patronage, not poverty.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A bowl (the starving artist's) shattered into pieces. One of the pieces is RED — the moment art starts earning. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 880)" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="miter">
    <!-- Intact bowl outline, ghosted behind -->
    <path d="M -260 100 Q -260 200 -200 200 L 200 200 Q 260 200 260 100 L 220 0 Q 0 60 -220 0 Z" opacity="0.18"/>
    <!-- Shattered pieces: 6 sharp triangular shards, displaced -->
    <g>
      <path d="M -260 100 L -160 0 L -100 80 L -160 200 Z" fill="#1a1a1a"/>
      <path d="M -100 80 L -160 0 L -40 -40 L 20 60 Z" fill="#1a1a1a"/>
      <path d="M 20 60 L -40 -40 L 80 -60 L 100 50 Z" fill="#1a1a1a"/>
      <!-- THE RED SHARD: the moment the bowl breaks open to a $47M Michelangelo legacy -->
      <path d="M 100 50 L 80 -60 L 200 -30 L 220 80 Z" fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46"/>
      <path d="M 220 80 L 200 -30 L 280 30 L 260 130 Z" fill="#1a1a1a"/>
      <path d="M 220 80 L 260 130 L 200 200 L 100 50 Z" fill="#1a1a1a"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A few small spilled 'coins' (circles) drifting away -->
    <g fill="#cccccc" opacity="0.7">
      <circle cx="-340" cy="240" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="-280" cy="280" r="6"/>
      <circle cx="320" cy="220" r="8"/>
      <circle cx="380" cy="260" r="12"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Tiny label under the red shard -->
    <text x="160" y="-80" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.06em">$47M</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The starving-artist bowl shattered into 6 shards — one is RED and labeled $47M, Michelangelo's modern equivalent. The 280px weight-500 title sits in the center, breaking through the shards. Concept: the myth is shattered; one of the pieces is prosperity.
